notes: We shipped the automated weekly report generator in Week 4 — it's live for all 8 account managers now and saving roughly 3-4 hours each per week. The campaign Q&A agent is still blocked: our data team discovered that our Postgres campaign data has inconsistent schema across clients (some have impression data, some don't), so we can't build a reliable RAG layer over it yet. On the positive side, we hired a backend engineer last month who has some experience with LLM APIs — not a full ML engineer but she's set up our first Claude API integration. We also lost a major client in Q2 which reduced our budget slightly. On the compliance front, our legal team just flagged that we need to be CCPA-compliant too since we have US clients — this is new.

outcome_updates.notes: Live for all 8 AMs. Saving 3-4 hrs/week per AM. Positive feedback from clients.

outcome_updates.blocker: Inconsistent Postgres schema across clients — impression data missing for ~30% of clients
outcome_updates.notes: Data team estimates 3-4 weeks to normalise schema before RAG layer is viable

outcome_updates.use_case_title: New Account Manager Onboarding Knowledge Base
outcome_updates.notes: Not yet started — deprioritised in favour of report generator
